The full spread across all three: about $170 a month and about $10,000 at closing. Financially, these are three versions of the same comfortable decision.

When You've Picked One

  1. Tell me the address. We write the offer support and update your pre-approval letter to match the exact price.
  2. We lock your rate. Once you're under contract, we secure pricing and order the appraisal.
  3. Your file is already built. Income is reviewed and documented — the heavy lifting is done up front so the path from contract to keys stays smooth.

Estimates prepared June 10, 2026 from preliminary closing cost worksheets. Figures assume a conventional 30-year fixed at a 6.99% note rate and 80% loan-to-value; property taxes and insurance are estimates and will be confirmed for the selected property. This is not a loan approval or a commitment to lend. Your actual rate, payment, and costs could be higher — get an official Loan Estimate before choosing a loan.
